title: PIPseq Pipeline
description: Single-cell RNA sequencing QC pipeline with DRAGEN scRNA processing and CRISPR guide assignment

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

fastq_list.description: Path to CSV file with FASTQ information
fastq_list.help_text: CSV file with columns: RGID, RGSM, RGTY, Read1File, Read2File. RGSM values represent subsample IDs. RGTY indicates readgroup type ('expression' or 'feature'). All rows with the same RGSM belong to the same subsample.

supersample_id.help_text: Unique identifier for the supersample being processed.

supersample_basename.help_text: Base name used for organizing output directories and files.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved

ref_tar.help_text: Path to the DRAGEN reference genome archive.

annotation_file.help_text: GTF or GFF gene annotation file used by DRAGEN for scRNA processing.

scrna_feature_barcode_reference.description: Feature barcode reference file for DRAGEN
scrna_feature_barcode_reference.help_text: CSV file containing feature barcode sequences for CRISPR guide detection.

num_input_cells.help_text: Expected number of cells in the input sample. Used for quality control metrics.

run_guide_assignment.description: Whether to run CRISPR guide assignment
run_guide_assignment.help_text: Enable or disable CRISPR guide assignment analysis. If disabled, only QC metrics will be generated.

min_valid_guides.description: Minimum number of valid guides for guide assignment QC
min_valid_guides.help_text: Minimum threshold for the number of valid guides per cell for quality control.

max_valid_guides.description: Maximum number of valid guides for guide assignment QC
max_valid_guides.help_text: Maximum threshold for the number of valid guides per cell for quality control.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline, typically set in a config file.
generic_options.help_text: These options are common to all pipelines and allow you to customize various aspects of pipeline execution.
